hooks.command: cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))"); for danger in 'rm -rf /' 'DROP TABLE' 'DROP DATABASE' '> /etc/passwd' 'chmod 777 /' '> /dev/'; do if echo "$cmd" | grep -qF "$danger"; then echo "BLOCKED: dangerous pattern detected: $danger" >&2; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0

python3 -c 'import subprocess,json,os; files=[f for f in subprocess.getoutput("git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null").split("\n") if f.endswith((".ts",".tsx",".js",".jsx")) and os.path.exists(f)]; msgs=["console.log in "+f for f in files if "console.log" in open(f).read()]; print(json.dumps({"systemMessage":"WARNING: "+"; ".join(msgs)})) if msgs else None'
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for console.log in modified files...
